nasb.text: And entering in, He *said to them, “Why make a commotion and weep? The child has not died, but is asleep.”

esv.text: And when he had entered, he said to them, “Why are you making a commotion and weeping? The child is not dead but sleeping.”

cnv.text: 就走進去，對眾人說：“為甚麼大哭大嚷呢？孩子不是死了，是睡著了。”

ccb.text: 耶稣进去问道：“你们为什么大哭大嚷呢？这孩子并没有死，只是睡着了。”

csbs.text: 耶稣进去对他们说：“为什么慌乱哭泣呢？孩子不是死了，而是睡了。”
